special_ability.name: Nuts!
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Akhorne is activated he can ignore the effects of his Stunty as well as any modifiers to his AG for a single Agility Test.

special_ability.name: Go Berserk!
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Anqi Panqi moves he may double his MA.

special_ability.name: Blast It!
special_ability.description: Once per half, at the start of his activation, Barik may use his cannon. Nominate an empty square in any adjacent square. Roll a D6 for each Standing player (from either team) within 3 squares of the nominated square. On a 4+, the player is hit.

special_ability.name: Explosive Vomit
special_ability.description: Once per game, when an opponent blocks Bilerot, he may use this special ability. The opposing coach must subtract 2 from the result of any block dice.

special_ability.name: Slither
special_ability.description: Once per game, Boa Kon'ssstriktr can ignore tackle zones when moving.

special_ability.name: Kaboom!
special_ability.description: Bomber can throw bombs using Hail Mary Pass rules.

special_ability.name: Crimson Tide
special_ability.description: Once per game, after using Bloodlust successfully, Karina gains an additional ST until the end of the turn.

special_ability.name: Pie Slinger
special_ability.description: Cindy throws pies that act as bombs but always scatter one fewer square.

special_ability.name: The Lord of the Night
special_ability.description: Once per game, Count Luthor may choose to automatically pass his Bloodlust roll without rolling.

special_ability.name: Reliable
special_ability.description: Deeproot is not treated as having Really Stupid.

special_ability.name: Tag Team
special_ability.description: Dribl and Drull are two players that count as one star player. They activate together.

special_ability.name: Mesmerizing Dance
special_ability.description: Once per game, Eldril may use Hypnotic Gaze on each Standing opponent adjacent to him when he is activated.

special_ability.name: Dazzling Pirouette
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Estelle performs a Blitz or Block action, she may add +1 to any Block dice result.

special_ability.name: Whirling Dervish
special_ability.description: Once per game, Fungus may make an additional Move action after completing his Ball and Chain move.

special_ability.name: Frenzied Rush
special_ability.description: Once per game, Glart may apply the Frenzy skill when performing a Blitz action.

special_ability.name: Shot to Nothing
special_ability.description: Once per game, after Gloriel has made a Pass action, she may move up to 3 squares.

special_ability.name: Two for One
special_ability.description: Glotl Stop carries two Skink players. Once per game, he may throw two Skinks instead of one (scatter separately).

special_ability.name: Dynamic Duo
special_ability.description: Grak can throw Crumbleberry using Throw Team-mate; Crumbleberry has the Right Stuff skill.

special_ability.name: Gored by the Bull
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Grashnak makes a Blitz action, he may add +1 to his ST for that action.

special_ability.name: Incorporeal
special_ability.description: Once per game, Gretchen may move through any Standing players as if they were not there.

special_ability.name: Consummate Professional
special_ability.description: Once per game, Griff may re-roll a single dice from a dice pool.

special_ability.name: Slayer
special_ability.description: Once per game, Grim may add +2 to his ST when blocking a Big Guy.

special_ability.name: Wisdom of the White Dwarf
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Grombrindal is activated he may select one team-mate within 2 squares. The selected team-mate gains one of the following Skills until the end of turn: Break Tackle, Dauntless, Mighty Blow, Sure Feet.

special_ability.name: Putrid Regurgitation
special_ability.description: Once per drive, Guffle may regurgitate the ball to a square adjacent to him.

special_ability.name: Treacherous
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Hakflem is tackled, he may transfer the tackle to an adjacent friendly player instead.

special_ability.name: Old Pro
special_ability.description: Once per game, Helmut may re-roll his Chainsaw kickback roll.

special_ability.name: Unstoppable
special_ability.description: Once per game, H'thark may add +1 MA when making a Blitz action.

special_ability.name: Rise from the Grave
special_ability.description: Once per game, if Ivan is Knocked Out, he may return to the reserves box instead of going to the KO'd box.

special_ability.name: Berserker Rage
special_ability.description: Once per game, Ivar may gain +2 ST for a Block or Blitz action.

special_ability.name: Look Out Kid!
special_ability.description: Once per game, when the Ball scatters, Jeremiah can move 3 squares towards it.

special_ability.name: Effortless Leap
special_ability.description: Once per game, Jordell may automatically pass his Leap roll without rolling.

special_ability.name: Liquid Fortification
special_ability.description: Once per half, at the end of any turn, Josef may remove a Stun result from himself or an adjacent team-mate.

special_ability.name: Indomitable
special_ability.description: Once per game, Karla may stand up for free after being Knocked Down.

special_ability.name: Cruel Eye
special_ability.description: Once per game, Kiroth may force an opponent to re-roll a successful Dodge roll.

special_ability.name: Wrecking Ball
special_ability.description: Once per game, Kreek may deal an Armour Roll with +1 to all adjacent players.

special_ability.name: Lord of Chaos
special_ability.description: Once per game, Lord Borak may command an adjacent team-mate to take a free Block action.

special_ability.name: Delicious Distraction
special_ability.description: Once per game, Maple may force a Turn Over to be ignored.

special_ability.name: Maximum Carnage
special_ability.description: Once per game, Max can use his Chainsaw without risk of kickback.

special_ability.name: The Mightiest!
special_ability.description: Morg can play for almost any team and does not suffer from Bone Head.

special_ability.name: Kick 'Em While They're Down
special_ability.description: Once per game, Nobbla may use his Chainsaw for a Foul action without rolling for Secret Weapon.

special_ability.name: Halfling Luck
special_ability.description: Once per game, Puggy can re-roll any single dice.

special_ability.name: Toxin Connoisseur
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Rashnak successfully uses Stab, the target must roll for Injury even if the Armour roll fails.

special_ability.name: Thinking Man's Troll
special_ability.description: Ripper does not have Really Stupid or Always Hungry.

special_ability.name: Catch of the Day
special_ability.description: Once per game, Rodney may re-roll a failed Catch roll.

special_ability.name: Bounding Leap
special_ability.description: Once per game, Rowana may make a Leap without needing to roll for AG.

special_ability.name: Slashing Nails
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Roxanna makes a Blitz action, she may apply the Claws skill.

special_ability.name: Ram
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Rumbelow makes a Blitz action, he gains +2 ST.

special_ability.name: Yoink!
special_ability.description: Once per game, when an opponent carrying the ball is knocked down adjacent to Scrappa, he may catch the ball.

special_ability.name: Fury of the Blood God
special_ability.description: Once per game, Scyla may re-roll a failed Unchannelled Fury roll.

special_ability.name: Master Assassin
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Skitter Stab-stab uses his Stab skill, he may add +1 to the Armour roll.

special_ability.name: Pump Up the Crowd
special_ability.description: Once per game, at the start of a drive, Skrorg may increase his team's Fan Factor by D3.

special_ability.name: Strong Passing Game
special_ability.description: Once per game, Skrull may re-roll a failed Pass action.

special_ability.name: Furious Outburst
special_ability.description: Once per game, Swiftvine may perform a free Block against an adjacent opponent without spending his activation.

special_ability.name: Sneakiest of the Lot
special_ability.description: Once per game, the Black Gobbo may disappear and reappear in any empty square on the pitch.

special_ability.name: Crushing Blow
special_ability.description: Once per game, The Mighty Zug may add +1 to an Injury roll he causes.

special_ability.name: Working In Tandem
special_ability.description: The twins share one activation but can perform actions together. When one passes and the other catches, both rolls gain +1.

special_ability.name: Beer Barrel Bash
special_ability.description: Once per game, Thorsson may knock down all adjacent Standing players (friend and foe).

special_ability.name: Krump and Smash
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Varag makes a Block action against an Undead player, he may add +2 ST.

special_ability.name: Savage Mauling
special_ability.description: Once per game, after Wilhelm successfully knocks down an opponent, he may immediately make a free Foul action against that player.

special_ability.name: Woodland Fury
special_ability.description: Once per game, Willow may gain the Frenzy skill for one Block or Blitz action.

special_ability.name: Watch Out!
special_ability.description: The first time each Drive that Withergrasp is the target of a Block action performed by an opposition player, he counts as having the Dodge skill.

special_ability.name: Excuse me, are you a Zoat?
special_ability.description: Once per game, when Zolcath is activated he may select an opposition player within 3 squares. The selected player immediately becomes Distracted.

special_ability.name: Blastin' Solves Everything
special_ability.description: Once per half, at the start of his activation, Zzharg may select a Standing opposition player within 3 squares and roll a D6. On a 3+, the selected player is hit. On a 2, the opposing coach selects a player (from either team, but not Zzharg) within 3 squares of the originally selected player to be hit instead. On a 1, Zzharg is hit instead. Make an Armour Roll for whichever player is hit. Zzharg's activation then immediately ends.
